title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Bride Samantha has mastered her weight-loss goals, but now she has to convince her mum to like the dress; a bride has a glam wedding in Puerto Rico.

title: Cake Boss
subTitle: It's Halloween and Buddy's eldest son wants a haunted house to match his spooky cake. Carlo's crew create an intricate carved pumpkin cake.

title: Cake Boss
subTitle: Rapper Fat Joe wants a cake to celebrate his new hit single, and Buddy's design is as good as gold! Plus, the team create a Gingerbread Man-inspired cake.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Time-tested dishes that will never go out of style include Brooke Williamson's favourite French onion soup in Los Angeles, and a bowl of ramen with Jet Tila in New York City.

title: Say Yes to the Dress UK
subTitle: Eccentric bride Hazelle wants a gown that shows her tattoos. But her strict step-mum wants them covered. Plus, will Khiea and her mum ever agree on a style?

title: Say Yes to the Dress UK
subTitle: Bride Melanie falls for a gown with sleeves and limited cleavage - but her outspoken entourage disagrees! And Nicola's family scuppers her selections.

title: Celebrity IOU
subTitle: Mandy Moore returns the love to Ce-Ce, a woman who has been deeply ingrained in her life for 15 years. Mandy calls on Jonathan and Drew to create an outdoor oasis for family get-togethers and backyard barbecues.

title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way
subTitle: The cast sits down with Shaun Robinson in NYC, with more couples together in person than ever before. A friend from Sarper's past joins the stage, everyone debates Josh and Lily's sex life, and one couple reveals a shocking break up.

title: Food Paradise
subTitle: A 15-pound bloody mary, a palatial pizza made of chicken Parmesan and more.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Excitement's in the air for both the brides and Randy who's going back to his bridal design roots! Jenni Pulos has a surprise for her friend, Monica.

title: Buddy vs. Duff
subTitle: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman revisit their first challenge from season one by making car cakes. Duff seeks redemption with a better version of his lowrider. Buddy takes the challenge for a new spin with a convertible '57 Chevy.

title: Restaurant: Impossible
subTitle: Chef Robert Irvine finds the owner of Denos I-76, a diner in Keenesburg, Colorado, abandoned by her employees and working herself into the ground. Robert must help her find staff and inspiration to turn this truck stop into a must-see destination.

subTitle: Jenni Yolo sets out to transform her younger sister's dark, duplex kitchen into a design masterpiece in only three days. Stepping outside her comfort zone in some areas, Jenni makes some bold design choices in hopes her sister will be blown away.
